articles.title: Can you ever stop supporting your football team?
articles.summary: Is it really a lifelong pledge of loyalty? BBC Sport asks whether a fan can really stop supporting their football team.

articles.title: Man City 'handling pressure' of WSL title race with 'statement' win
articles.summary: Manchester City's manager Andree Jeglertz says he "enjoyed" his side's performance in a dominating win at Manchester United that edges them closer to a first WSL title in a decade.

articles.title: Senegal parade Afcon trophy before friendly despite title controversy
articles.summary: Senegal parade the Africa Cup of Nations trophy before Saturday's friendly match against Peru in Paris - despite being stripped of the title earlier this month.

articles.title: When football turned to penalties to end 'cruel' system
articles.summary: No-one knew what to expect at football's first official penalty shootout - and no-one wanted to go down in history as the first to miss.

articles.title: McLeish stays as St Mirren boss until end of season
articles.summary: Craig McLeish will continue as St Mirren interim manager until the end of the season, the Scottish Premiership club have confirmed.

articles.title: How do Man City replace captain Silva if he leaves?
articles.summary: Manchester City could find themselves without the services of their manager and captain next season with the futures of both Pep Guardiola and Bernardo Silva in question beyond this summer.

articles.title: Man City edge closer to WSL title by beating Man Utd
articles.summary: Vivianne Miedema's double helps Manchester City edge closer to the Women's Super League title with a comfortable derby win over neighbours United.

articles.title: 10-player Liverpool survive fightback to win Merseyside derby
articles.summary: Ten-player Liverpool hold on for their first Women's Super League away win of the season with a hard-fought victory over local rivals Everton at Goodison Park.

articles.title: Southend and Wealdstone tee up Wembley date in FA Trophy
articles.summary: National League sides Southend and Wealdstone will meet at Wembley in the FA Trophy final after wins over National League North opponents.

articles.title: Spurs should not appoint De Zerbi - fans' group
articles.summary: Tottenham should not appoint former Marseille manager Roberto de Zerbi because of his support for Mason Greenwood, says a women's fans group.

articles.title: Larne move six clear after Glens draw with Blues
articles.summary: Larne beat Cliftonville 2-0 to move six points clear at the top of the Irish Premiership table as nearest challengers Glentoran draw 1-1 with rivals Linfield.

articles.title: Kim breaks 54-hole LPGA Tour record as England's Rhodes impresses
articles.summary: Hyo-Joo Kim broke the 54-hole record on the LPGA Tour with an 11-under 61 taking the South Korean to 25 under at the Ford Championship and into a four-shot lead as she looks to secure her second title...

articles.summary: Tony Pulis explains why international breaks can be an opportunity as well as a problem for managers, and what he did when one of his players did not return on time.

articles.title: O'Neill positive about Northern Ireland future despite Italy defeat
